briefdescription.para: Classify a GPG colon output record type.

parameterdescription.para: The first field of a GPG colon record (e.g., "pub", "sec", "uid")

briefdescription.para: Handle a pub or sec record in GPG colon output.

parameterdescription.para: The colon-split fields of the record
True if this is a secret key record (sec)
UserInfo to populate with key data

briefdescription.para: Handle a uid record in GPG colon output.

parameterdescription.para: The colon-split fields of the record
UserInfo to populate with user name

briefdescription.para: Handle an fpr (fingerprint) record in GPG colon output.

parameterdescription.para: The colon-split fields of the record
UserInfo to update with fingerprint if it matches key

briefdescription.para: Parse GPG with-colons output into a list of UserInfo.

parameterdescription.para: Raw output from GPG with-colons with-fingerprint
